characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Blue Is Heroic: She usually wears a blue shirt, and she's our main protagonist. Cheerful Child: She's friendly and sweet most of the time. The Cutie: You can't help but see how cute she can be, just like her animal friends! Kids Love Dinosaurs: They're her favorite animal to the point that a lot of items given to her are themed around them. One of the Boys: Kai-Lan is quite tomboyish, and all of her closest friends are boys. Her only female friends are Lulu and Mei Mei, who don't hang much.

characters.name: Kai-Lan
characters.description: Blue Is Heroic: She usually wears a blue shirt, and she's our main protagonist. Cheerful Child: She's friendly and sweet most of the time. The Cutie: You can't help but see how cute she can be, just like her animal friends! Kids Love Dinosaurs: They're her favorite animal to the point that a lot of items given to her are themed around them. One of the Boys: Kai-Lan is quite tomboyish, and all of her closest friends are boys. Her only female friends are Lulu and Mei Mei, who don't hang much.

characters.name: Ye-Ye
characters.description: Adults Are Useless: It's always Kai-Lan and her animal friends helping other friends instead of him being around. Subverted in "Kai-Lan's Playhouse" where he gives Hoho a timeout for hitting Rintoo. Beware the Nice Ones: Downplayed. In "Kai-Lan's Playhouse", he scolds Hoho for hitting Rintoo. Parental Substitute: Serves as this to his granddaughter as her parents are ever seen or mentioned. Straight Man: He is the most level-headed character.

characters.name: Rintoo
characters.description: A small 6-year-old tiger with a slight lisp who tries everything with reckless abandon. He proclaims everything as "awethome!", and often gets into trouble with his headstrong nature. Acquired Situational Narcissism: In "Sports Day", Rintoo wins all the dinosaur games and becomes extremely egotistical about it. He brags about it and rubs his victory in everyone's faces, alienating his friends. Keet: Rintoo is very cheerful and easygoing. Sore Loser: In "The Dragonboat Festival", Rintoo's refusal to listen to Ye-Ye's instructions causes him to lose the race. This makes him furious, and he's nearly inconsolable until he's finally convinced that the reason he lost is because he didn't listen. Yellow Is Cheerful: He's a yellow tiger who is very energetic.

characters.name: Tolee
characters.description: A meek, but kind 5-year-old koala who likes panda bears. Half-Dressed Cartoon Animal: He doesn't wear any pants but wears a sweatshirt and slippers. High Koala-ty Cuteness: A koala who is just about as adorable as Kai-Lan and her friends. A Lizard Named "Liz": He has a stuffed panda named Pandy. Out-of-Character Moment: He is usually polite and understanding, but in one episode, when Rintoo accidentally rips Tolee's painting, Tolee refuses to forgive him, even after Rintoo fixes it.

characters.name: Hoho
characters.description: A 3-year-old monkey who is excitable as he is kind. The Baby of the Bunch: He's the youngest of Kai-Lan's animal friends at three. Keet: Like Rintoo, he's cheerful and always looking for fun. The Napoleon: Hoho is the smallest character in the main bunch, but like most kids, he has been known to get very angry sometimes, such as in "Kai-Lan's Playhouse" where he punches Rintoo's leg in frustration when he can't get what he wants. Trademark Favorite Food: Bananas.

characters.name: Lulu
characters.description: A 5-year-old helpful rhinoceros who floats around with a balloon. Amazing Technicolor Wildlife: She is a pink rhino. Balloonacy: She travels by floating around with a balloon tied to her horn. Girly Girl: She enjoys tea parties, dancing, playing house, and dressing up like a fairy. Nice Girl: She is very sweet and loves to help her friends.

characters.name: Mr. Sun
characters.description: The sun who is seen sleeping at the beginning of every episode, often causing Kai-Lan to tickle him so she can start her day. Meaningful Rename: At night, he's called Mr. Moon.
